options.B: capabilities[] + dependencies[] (Minimal additive, but lacks pipeline features)
options.C: Directed execution graph (Nodes = Capabilities, Edges = Data Flow)

rankings.maintainability: Option C (Explicit edges prevent implicit coupling)
rankings.languageIndependence: Option C (DAG execution can run in any language)
rankings.runtimeSimplicity: Option C (Runtime just traverses the graph)
rankings.futureOrchestration: Option C (Supports branching, loops, and parallel execution)

smallestAdditive: Option C implemented as a lightweight JSON DAG.
